title: Phase A · Commit B: Server services layer v1.x cleanup + delete bootstrap-guide.ts
description: Remove all v1.x `.fabric/rules/` and INITIAL_TAXONOMY references from the server services layer. Specifically: (1) `packages/server/src/services/rule-meta-builder.ts`: rename misleading functions like `findFabricRuleFiles`; switch path constants `.fabric/rules/` → `.fabric/knowledge/{type}/`. (2) `packages/server/src/services/doctor.ts` + `doctor.test.ts`: remove all checks targeting `.fabric/rules/` or `INITIAL_TAXONOMY` (false-positive forever in v2; rc.4 will add 6 new lint checks separately). (3) `packages/server/src/watcher.ts` (and test): watch path `.fabric/rules/**` → `.fabric/knowledge/**` + `.fabric/knowledge/pending/**`. (4) `packages/server/src/index.ts` + `packages/server/src/http.ts`: path constants synced. (5) **Delete entire file** `packages/shared/src/node/bootstrap-guide.ts` (v1 manual setup guidance, v2 init is turnkey).

files.change: Rename findFabricRuleFiles and similar misleading function names to knowledge-aware names; switch .fabric/rules/ path constants to .fabric/knowledge/{type}/
Remove all doctor checks targeting .fabric/rules/ or INITIAL_TAXONOMY (these would false-positive forever in v2; rc.4 will introduce 6 new v2 lint checks separately)
Change watch path .fabric/rules/** to .fabric/knowledge/** plus an explicit .fabric/knowledge/pending/** glob (pending lifecycle layer)
Sync any remaining .fabric/rules/ path constants to .fabric/knowledge/{type}/
Sync any remaining .fabric/rules/ path constants to .fabric/knowledge/{type}/
Delete entire file — v1 manual setup guidance is obsolete in v2 (init pipeline is turnkey, no human-readable bootstrap doc needed)

implementation: Run `grep -rn '\.fabric/rules\|INITIAL_TAXONOMY\|findFabricRuleFiles\|bootstrap-guide' packages/server/src/ packages/shared/src/` to enumerate all hits
In rule-meta-builder.ts: rename functions (e.g. findFabricRuleFiles → findKnowledgeFiles) — update all call sites in same package; switch path constants to .fabric/knowledge/{type}/ structure

In services/doctor.ts: identify lint checks that probe .fabric/rules/ existence or INITIAL_TAXONOMY content; delete those check functions AND their registration in the doctor pipeline (do NOT replace with stubs — rc.4 owns v2 lint design)
In watcher.ts: update chokidar/fs.watch glob patterns to .fabric/knowledge/** + .fabric/knowledge/pending/**; verify event handlers route by knowledge type (decisions/pitfalls/etc.) correctly
In server/src/index.ts and http.ts: locate any KNOWLEDGE_DIR / RULES_DIR / similar path constants and switch to .fabric/knowledge/{type}/
Delete packages/shared/src/node/bootstrap-guide.ts AND remove any imports of it (likely from CLI init or doctor command)
Run `pnpm --filter @fabric/server build && pnpm --filter @fabric/shared build` to confirm
Re-run grep gate — must be empty

reference.pattern: v1.x dead code removal — server-side mirror of TASK-001
reference.examples: Follow rc.1 commit aaf9c2c — hard delete bootstrap-guide.ts as a sibling of the broader cleanup

criteria: No matches for `\.fabric/rules` in `packages/server/src/` (grep returns empty)
No matches for `INITIAL_TAXONOMY` in `packages/server/src/` (grep returns empty)
No matches for `findFabricRuleFiles` in repo (grep returns empty — function renamed)
No matches for `bootstrap-guide` import strings in `packages/` (grep returns empty)
Watcher glob now includes both `.fabric/knowledge/**` and `.fabric/knowledge/pending/**`

scope_boundary: OUT OF SCOPE: CLI command layer (TASK-001 owns bootstrap.ts, init.ts, scan.ts, forensic.ts), templates (TASK-003), tests (TASK-004 — doctor.test.ts is touched here for the lint-check removal but new v2 lint tests are NOT added; rc.4 owns v2 lint suite). Do NOT add new doctor v2 lint checks here — that is rc.4 scope.

rationale.chosen_approach: Atomic server-layer cleanup commit, parallel-safe with TASK-001 (no file overlap)
alternatives_considered: Defer doctor.ts changes to rc.4 with v2 lint suite
decision_factors: Layer isolation enables clean revert if regression found
doctor false-positives must die NOW (any v1 check would alarm on every v2 install)
rc.4 lint suite design is independent — can land later
rationale.tradeoffs: doctor temporarily has fewer checks until rc.4 — acceptable because v1 checks were actively wrong in v2 layout

manual_checks: Run `node packages/cli/dist/index.js doctor` on a fresh v2 init — must NOT report .fabric/rules/ as missing
Spot-check watcher.ts diff: glob includes both .fabric/knowledge/** and .fabric/knowledge/pending/**
success_metrics: Doctor command runs without false-positive on v2 layout
